name: Lit Polyresin Easter Egg Shaped House Lamp - Spritz™
description:
Brighten up your home with the Lit Polyresin Easter Egg Shaped House Lamp - Spritz™. Crafted from durable polyresin, this charming figurine adds a touch of whimsy to your Easter decor. Its multicolored design brings a playful vibe, while the compact size makes it perfect for any indoor space. With a height of just over 5 inches, it's an ideal decorative object to celebrate the season.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
